name: Macaroni with Ham and Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Macaroni, cooked according to directions
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in butter until pale in color.
2. Add asparagus and ham; saute for 2 minutes.
3. Keep the heat low and add heavy cream.
4. After 30 seconds, turn off the heat. Do not let the cream get too hot or it will separate.
5. Pour over hot cooked pasta and toss with cheese.
6. Serve with extra cheese on the side.
